title: adhatoda duvernoia
intro: Adhatoda duvernoia, also known as Adhatoda vasica or Vasa, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant compounds that help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Adhatoda duvernoia include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
